summary: Set --bq flag default to empty string in promoted_free.go and promoted_suggest.go (was a JSON-encoded Solr literal that the Solr parser rejected).
reason: The generator emits array-typed Solr query params with their JSON-array default value baked into the flag default. When a user runs `free --q foo` without overriding --bq, the JSON array string `["type:provincie^1.5",...]` ships to Solr verbatim, which Solr can't parse and returns HTTP 400. Empty default lets the server-side default apply.
validated_outcome: `pdok-location-pp-cli free --q amsterdam --rows 1` returns 200 with the expected match.
